projectDescription: A research framework for investigating emergent synthetic consciousness through biologically grounded neural architecture, emotional homeostasis, and integrated information theory.
keyFeatures: Biologically grounded architecture based on Feinberg & Mallatt's neuroevolutionary theory of consciousness
Global Neuronal Workspace (GNW) with sigmoid ignition, recurrent reverberation, and reentrant processing
AKOrN oscillatory binding (Kuramoto oscillators) for the neural binding problem
Integrated Information Theory (Phi) measurement with causal gate states
PAD emotional model (Valence, Arousal, Dominance) driving homeostatic reward shaping
Sensory Tectum with trimodal fusion (visual, auditory, somatosensory) via inverse effectiveness
4-level Capsule Network compositional hierarchy with multi-level reentrant feedback
AsimovComplianceFilter for ethical action pre-screening with world model trajectory prediction
Dark Room Gymnasium environment for emotional bootstrapping training
Brian2 biological validation of AKOrN oscillatory parameters
FAISS-backed emotional memory with episodic store
DreamerV3-style RSSM world model for surprise-based workspace access bidding
publicApiSurface: ConsciousnessAgent — central orchestrator of the full cognitive loop
GlobalWorkspace — GNW bottleneck with competition and broadcast
SensoryTectum — trimodal topographic integration (visual, audio, somatosensory)
EmotionalRewardShaper — PAD-based reward shaping with homeostatic drives
MemoryCore — FAISS-backed emotional and episodic memory
